name: Ferret terminal V1 recording preparation
description: Ketamine 20 mg/kg i.m. induction; atropine 0.16-0.8 mg/kg i.m. and dexamethasone 0.5 mg/kg i.m.; mask isoflurane -> tracheostomy -> ventilated 1.5-3% isoflurane in 2:1 N2O:O2; IP cannula for gallamine triethiodide 10-30 mg/kg/h and Ringer's 3 mL/kg/h; wound margins infused with bupivacaine; custom stereotaxic frame (non-vision-blocking); bilateral V1 craniotomy; 1x1 mm durotomy; eyelids sutured open with contact lenses; post-paralysis N2O:O2 adjusted to 1:1; continuous ECG; body 37 C. Terminal: pentobarbital 200 mg/kg i.p., transcardial 4% PFA perfusion.
